creator: chris@chrullrich.net
text:
The reason for the repeated rebuilds is that the flavorizing did not change the origin. To detect whether a port has been moved and therefore the package needs rebuilding, poudriere looks for MOVED lines that have the existing package's origin (minus the flavor suffix) in the first column.

Removing the MOVED entry resolves the problem, but I don't know whether it is the correct fix.
